requirement_topic.en: EMC — UNIT Standards (Harmonised with IEC/CISPR/Mercosur NM)

summary.en: Uruguay applies UNIT (Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas) standards for EMC, many of which are harmonised with IEC/CISPR and Mercosur NM (Normas Mercosur) standards. Wireless and IoT devices must meet applicable UNIT EMC emission and immunity limits. EMC test reports from accredited laboratories are required as part of the URSEC homologación technical file. CE CISPR/EN reports may be accepted as a basis; GB/T (Chinese EMC standards) are not directly recognised.
summary.zh: 乌拉圭采用UNIT（乌拉圭技术标准研究院）EMC标准，多数与IEC/CISPR及Mercosur NM（南方共同市场标准）协调。无线及物联网设备须符合适用的UNIT EMC发射和抗扰度限值。认可实验室出具的EMC检测报告须作为URSEC合规认证技术文件的组成部分。CE CISPR/EN报告可作为基础被接受；GB/T（中国EMC标准）不被直接承认。
summary.zht: 烏拉圭採用UNIT（烏拉圭技術標準研究院）EMC標準，多數與IEC/CISPR及Mercosur NM（南方共同市場標準）協調。無線及物聯網裝置須符合適用的UNIT EMC發射和抗擾度限值。認可實驗室出具的EMC檢測報告須作為URSEC合規認證技術文件的組成部分。CE CISPR/EN報告可作為基礎被接受；GB/T（中國EMC標準）不被直接承認。

standards_or_laws: UNIT EMC standards (harmonised with IEC/CISPR series)
URSEC technical requirements referencing UNIT/NM standards

summary.en: China uses GB/T and GB mandatory EMC standards (GB 9254, GB/T 17618, etc.) harmonised with IEC/CISPR. CNAS-accredited laboratory reports are used domestically. GB/T reports are generally not accepted as equivalents in Uruguay; IEC/CISPR-based reports from internationally recognised laboratories are more likely to be accepted.
summary.zh: 中国采用与IEC/CISPR协调的GB/T及GB强制EMC标准（GB 9254、GB/T 17618等），国内使用CNAS认可实验室报告。GB/T报告在乌拉圭通常不被视为等同；来自国际认可实验室的基于IEC/CISPR的报告更可能被接受。
summary.zht: 中國採用與IEC/CISPR協調的GB/T及GB強制EMC標準（GB 9254、GB/T 17618等），國內使用CNAS認可實驗室報告。GB/T報告在烏拉圭通常不被視為等同；來自國際認可實驗室的基於IEC/CISPR的報告更可能被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Information Technology Equipment — Radio Disturbance Characteristics

gap.en: Partial gap. Both markets reference IEC/CISPR as the technical basis, but UNIT/Mercosur NM standards and acceptance of test reports differ. Chinese GB/T reports are not directly accepted; EMC reports from internationally accredited laboratories (ILAC/APLAC members) tested to IEC/CISPR or EN standards are the most transferable.
gap.zh: 部分差距。两个市场均以IEC/CISPR为技术基础，但UNIT/Mercosur NM标准及检测报告的接受程度不同。中国GB/T报告不被直接接受；来自国际认可实验室（ILAC/APLAC成员）按IEC/CISPR或EN标准检测的EMC报告可移植性最强。
gap.zht: 部分差距。兩個市場均以IEC/CISPR為技術基礎，但UNIT/Mercosur NM標準及檢測報告的接受程度不同。中國GB/T報告不被直接接受；來自國際認可實驗室（ILAC/APLAC成員）按IEC/CISPR或EN標準檢測的EMC報告可移植性最強。

source.publisher: UNIT — Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to UNIT/Mercosur NM standards is required as part of URSEC homologación. Chinese GB/T EMC reports are not directly transferable; engage an internationally accredited laboratory to produce IEC/CISPR-based reports. Confirm current UNIT standard references with a qualified Uruguayan regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合UNIT/Mercosur NM标准的EMC合规是URSEC合规认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T EMC报告不可直接转用；需委托国际认可实验室出具基于IEC/CISPR的报告。请与合格的乌拉圭监管专业人士确认现行UNIT标准参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合UNIT/Mercosur NM標準的EMC合規是URSEC合規認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T EMC報告不可直接轉用；需委託國際認可實驗室出具基於IEC/CISPR的報告。請與合格的烏拉圭監管專業人士確認現行UNIT標準參考。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Spectrum & Frequency Compliance (URSEC Band Plan)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱与频率合规（URSEC频率规划）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜與頻率合規（URSEC頻率規劃）

summary.en: Wireless devices operating in Uruguay must comply with URSEC frequency allocations and permitted power levels for unlicensed bands (e.g. 2.4 GHz ISM, 5 GHz U-NII). URSEC maintains the national radio frequency plan aligned with ITU Radio Regulations. Devices must not operate on frequencies or at power levels not permitted by URSEC. Frequency compliance is verified as part of the homologación technical file.
summary.zh: 在乌拉圭运行的无线设备须符合URSEC对免许可频段（如2.4 GHz ISM、5 GHz U-NII）的频率分配及允许功率电平要求。URSEC根据ITU无线电规则维护国家无线电频率计划。设备不得在URSEC未授权的频率或功率水平下运行。频率合规在合规认证技术文件中予以核实。
summary.zht: 在烏拉圭運行的無線裝置須符合URSEC對免許可頻段（如2.4 GHz ISM、5 GHz U-NII）的頻率分配及允許功率電平要求。URSEC根據ITU無線電規則維護國家無線電頻率計劃。裝置不得在URSEC未授權的頻率或功率水平下運行。頻率合規在合規認證技術文件中予以核實。

standards_or_laws: URSEC National Radio Frequency Plan (Plan Nacional de Atribución de Frecuencias)
URSEC resolutions on unlicensed band conditions

summary.en: China's SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee) administers radio frequency type approval and national band plans. SRRC-approved frequency parameters may differ from URSEC allocations — particularly for 5 GHz channels (DFS requirements and permitted sub-bands can differ). Chinese frequency approvals are not recognised by URSEC.
summary.zh: 中国国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）负责无线电频率型号核准及国家频率规划。SRRC核准的频率参数可能与URSEC分配不同——尤其是5 GHz信道（DFS要求及允许子频段可能不同）。中国频率批准不被URSEC承认。
summary.zht: 中國國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）負責無線電頻率型號核准及國家頻率規劃。SRRC核准的頻率參數可能與URSEC分配不同——尤其是5 GHz信道（DFS要求及允許子頻段可能不同）。中國頻率批准不被URSEC承認。

standards_or_laws: China National Radio Frequency Allocation Table (MIIT)
MIIT regulations on unlicensed short-range devices

gap.en: Moderate gap. Both markets follow ITU Radio Regulations as the global framework, but permitted sub-bands, channel plans, and DFS requirements for 5 GHz Wi-Fi may differ. Verify specific frequency and power parameters against URSEC allocations; reconfiguration of firmware channel lists may be required.
gap.zh: 中等差距。两个市场均遵循ITU无线电规则作为全球框架，但5 GHz Wi-Fi的允许子频段、信道规划及DFS要求可能不同。需对照URSEC分配核实具体频率和功率参数；可能需要重新配置固件信道列表。
gap.zht: 中等差距。兩個市場均遵循ITU無線電規則作為全球框架，但5 GHz Wi-Fi的允許子頻段、信道規劃及DFS要求可能不同。需對照URSEC分配核實具體頻率和功率參數；可能需要重新配置韌體信道列表。

source.publisher: URSEC — Unidad Reguladora de Servicios de Comunicaciones

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Radio frequency and power compliance with the URSEC national frequency plan is required. Chinese SRRC approvals are not recognised. Verify 5 GHz sub-band availability and DFS obligations against current URSEC allocations; firmware adjustment may be needed for the Uruguayan market. Confirm with a qualified Uruguayan regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须符合URSEC国家频率规划的无线电频率和功率要求。中国SRRC批准不被承认。需对照现行URSEC分配核实5 GHz子频段可用性及DFS义务；乌拉圭市场可能需要调整固件。请与合格的乌拉圭监管专业人士确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須符合URSEC國家頻率規劃的無線電頻率和功率要求。中國SRRC批准不被承認。需對照現行URSEC分配核實5 GHz子頻段可用性及DFS義務；烏拉圭市場可能需要調整韌體。請與合格的烏拉圭監管專業人士確認。
